creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
forwarded from email received in my mbox ...

----- Forwarded message from Manfred Lotz <manfred.lotz@yahoo.de> -----

Date: Tue, 25 Jan 2011 20:47:16 +0100
From: Manfred Lotz <manfred.lotz@yahoo.de>
To: portmgr-feedback@FreeBSD.org, Mark Linimon <linimon@FreeBSD.org>
Subject: Re: FreeBSD ports Problem Reports for ports you maintain
X-Mailer: Claws Mail 3.7.8 (GTK+ 2.22.1; x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu)

Hi Mark,

On Fri, 21 Jan 2011 08:29:51 +0100 (CET)
linimon@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Dear FreeBSD port maintainer:
> 
> As part of an ongoing effort to reduce the number of Problem Reports
> (PRs) that affect the FreeBSD ports system, we are attempting to
> identify PRs for ports where the port maintainer may never have been
> informed about the PRs in the first place, and notify him or her of
> this fact.
> 
> The PRs are listed below.
> 
> PR number:          122890
> PR title:           Update port: www/ocaml-net (revision, added
> options) category:           www
> portname:           ocaml-net
> submitter:          jaapb@kerguelen.org
> arrival date:       2008-04-18 16:50:00
> PR state:           open
> URL:                http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=122890

Due to hardware problems I had with my new laptop last year for the
time being I switched to a Linux system so that currently I do not
have a FreeBSD system in my reach to do the port upgrade.
 

Sorry about that.


-- 
Manfred


----- End forwarded message -----
